plot_selected.title: Scatter Plot of Energy Above Hull vs Band Gap
plot_selected.description: This plot shows the relationship between energy above hull and band gap for the retrieved materials.
plot_selected.rationale: Understanding the relationship between energy above hull and band gap helps identify materials that are both stable and have suitable electronic properties.

plot_selected.title: Scatter Plot of Band Gap vs Energy Above Hull
plot_selected.description: This plot shows the relationship between band gap and energy above hull for the retrieved materials.
plot_selected.rationale: This plot helps in identifying materials that are both stable and have suitable electronic properties.

plot_selected.title: Scatter Plot of Density vs Energy Above Hull
plot_selected.description: This plot shows the relationship between density and energy above hull for the retrieved materials.
plot_selected.rationale: Analyzing the relationship between density and energy above hull can help identify stable materials with suitable physical properties.

plot_selected.title: Histogram of Energy Above Hull
plot_selected.description: This histogram shows the distribution of energy above hull values for the retrieved materials.
plot_selected.rationale: The distribution of energy above hull values helps assess the stability of the materials.

plot_selected.title: Histogram of Density
plot_selected.description: This histogram shows the distribution of density values for the retrieved materials.
plot_selected.rationale: The distribution of density values provides insights into the physical characteristics of the materials.

selection_notes: Selected plots include scatter energy_above_hull vs band_gap (plot_1) and histogram density (plot_5) as per approved intents. Added scatter plots for density vs energy_above_hull (plot_3) and band_gap vs energy_above_hull (plot_7) for robustness. Histogram of energy_above_hull (plot_4) included for stability distribution.
